rationale: Materials L4 decomposes each L3 into named material families or processing/characterization sub-methods. Battery cathodes split by chemistry family; perovskite PV split by structure (single-junction/tandem/lead-free); 2D materials split by class (graphene/TMD/MXene/heterostructures); biomaterials split by tissue application; metals by alloy class. Materials-by-design split high-throughput experimental + ML/generative + DFT. Microscopy split TEM/STEM, X-ray synchrotron, atom probe.

uncovered_concerns: Did not L4-split semiconductor materials beyond GaN/SiC/Ga2O3 — IGZO + ZnO + 2D semiconductor materials live under 2D-heterostructures L4.
Ceramics & Glasses L3 only has 4 L4 — most ceramics papers cluster on those 4 named families in the corpus.
